concerns.text: Task T002 contains placeholder text '[research question from original passage would go here]' in the verification clause. This prevents deterministic execution — the implementer cannot know what dependencies to verify without the actual research question content.

Task T026 (synthetic dataset generation) has incorrect dependency 'DEPENDS ON: T028' (power analysis). Per spec.md FR-030, synthetic data generation is independent of power analysis. This creates a circular/blocking dependency that prevents parallel execution.

Tasks T048, T049, T083 require 'novice-user verification' with 'written confirmation log'. This requires actual human testing, not just creating documentation. The task should specify creating the verification protocol, not executing human verification (which is a separate research activity).

Tasks T069c and T081 require 'human annotators' to conduct manual annotation. This is not executable by an LLM implementer — the task should specify creating the annotation protocol and data structure, with human annotation as a separate research-phase activity.

Tasks T100a-c reference 'Reference-Validator Agent' that may not exist in the codebase. The task should either implement the agent or specify integration with an existing validation service. Currently the implementer has no concrete artifact to produce.

Task T097a states 'Update state/projects/...yaml updated_at timestamp after any artifact change' but does not specify which artifact changes trigger this update. The implementer needs explicit trigger conditions (e.g., 'after T056, T076, T077 complete').
